title: [SCP] | Secure Craft Protect
description:
An SCP Foundation mod.

Adds mobs, items, and a way to secure anomalies to protect the Overworld...
body:
![BisectHosting - clockwork-interactive](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/555d818bccbfd43e615b81ef7bf3e07bb7fe9d3b_0.webp) ### **WARNING - The Modrinth page is not as up to date as the Curseforge page. Please refer to the Curseforge page for the latest news of the mod.**

 

 

Secure Craft Protect is a mod that adds in the anomalies known as SCP's from the SCP Foundation into Minecraft!

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 This is a mod about containing anomalies. Specifically anomalous mobs, items, and even structures. There is a sort of "quest" system to obtain anomalies for your world.

 

("Quest" system currently has a rushed implementation, but will be reworked in some time.)

 

Over 22 SCP's and still counting!

 

Spoiler list will contain all SCP's, their names, and authors.

This list was compiled with the use of CROM to find the authors of the articles within the game.

 

    Spoiler * SCP-006 - Fountain of Youth | [Unknown Author], Epic Phail Spy, Proxtown * SCP-019 - The Monster Pot | Sophia Light * SCP-049 - The Plague Doctor | DJKAKTUS & Gabriel Jade * SCP-058 - The Heart of Darkness | [Unknown Author] * SCP-063 - "The World's Best Tothbrush" | Kain Pathos Crow * SCP-096 - "The Shy Guy" | Dr Dan * SCP-106 - The Old Man | Dr Gears * SCP-109 - Infinite Canteen | Proxtown * SCP-111 - Dragon Snails | Adam Henderson * SCP-131 - The "Eye Pods" | [Unknown Author] * SCP-173 - The Sculpture - The Original | Moto42 * SCP-207 - Cola Bottles | Aeish * SCP-310 - Eternal Flame | JonnyD * SCP-330 - Take Only Two | Dr Kondraki * SCP-346 - "Pterry" the Pterodactyl | agatharights * SCP-500 - Panacea | snorlison * SCP-811 - Swamp Woman | Pig_catapult * SCP-939 - With Many Voices | Adam Smascher, & EchoFourDelta * SCP-966 - Sleep Killers | Enma Ai * SCP-999 - The Tickle Monster | ProfSnider * SCP-1025 - Encyclopedia of Diseases | Lasergoose * SCP-3199 - Humans, Refuted | bittermixin

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

_(Mod not affiliated with "SCPCraft" or the old remake of that mod, "Secure Craft Protect". This mods name just unfortunately was coincidentally the same as that mod)_ _(SCP-049 Voice lines done by "The Volgun")_
